name: Kaizen
description: Applies continuous improvement methodology through four pillars: Kaizen (incremental iteration), Poka-Yoke (error-proofing via type systems and validation), Standardized Work (following established patterns), and Just-In-Time (YAGNI, avoiding over-engineering), based on Lean manufacturing philosophy

findings_summary.notes: Prompt-only skill (SKILL.md only, no scripts or hooks). Comprehensive reference guide with excellent TypeScript/code examples demonstrating iterative improvement, type-safe error proofing, pattern consistency, and YAGNI principles. Content is high quality and practically actionable. No executable code, no network calls, zero attack surface. Part of well-maintained NeoLabHQ/context-engineering-kit (532 stars, active as of 2026-02-24, GPL-3.0). Kaizen skill directory contains only SKILL.md. Integrates with other kaizen plugin commands (/why, /cause-and-effect, etc.) but those are separate files.

scan_summary: SKILL.md only - no scripts, hooks, or executables. High-quality educational content on software improvement methodology. No security concerns.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
